Cargo & Air Waybill (AWB) Tracking

Select your booking type from Ocean, Air, Less-than-container-load (LCL) or Parcel and enter your tracking number to view full tracking details.

An Air Waybill number can be 10 to 19 characters.
Valid formats: 1234567891, 1234567HKG, HK123456789, HKG1234567, HKG123456A, AAR00000031, SHAA721743, S23AAAR0007021, 14354370632249344.

Track
No results found

We couldn't find any Air Waybills available on public track for your search.
Please check you have entered your reference correctly and try again.
